name: todos
description: A git-tracked, one-file-per-item todo/roadmap system driven by slash commands (/todo:add, /todo:list, /todo:done). Status is the folder (todos/ vs todos/done/); frontmatter is title/area/author/created. No runtime deps; lives outside the app bundle.

notes: No runtime dependencies — this module adds no npm packages and nothing to the app bundle. todos/ lives outside the import graph.

The author field is resolved at capture time from the GitHub identity: `gh api user -q .login`, falling back to `git config user.name`. gh is optional; without it the field falls back to the git name, and if both are empty the field is omitted.

verify: The three commands exist under .claude/commands/todo/ and show up as /todo:add, /todo:list, /todo:done in Claude Code.
`/todo:add try the todo system` creates todos/<today>-try-the-todo-system.md with title/area/author/created frontmatter.
The author field holds the current GitHub handle (matches `gh api user -q .login`).
`/todo:list` renders the roadmap grouped by area. `/todo:done try` git-moves the file into todos/done/.
